headline: Why the Next Three Weeks Will Decide the Stock Market’s Second-Half Fate
summary: Jeffery Hirsh of the Stock Trader’s Almanac notes that the  typically enjoys a 12-day rally that begins in late June and runs until mid-July.  This year’s vintage will likely expire on July 14, just as  JPMorgan Chase  kicks-off the bulk of the bank and financial earnings reporting for the second quarter.  “Since 1985, the Nasdaq has averaged 2.5% over this 12-trading-day window, with a median advance of 2.9%,” he said in a recent blog post.

raw.headline: Why the Next Three Weeks Will Decide the Stock Market’s Second-Half Fate
raw.summary: Jeffery Hirsh of the Stock Trader’s Almanac notes that the  typically enjoys a 12-day rally that begins in late June and runs until mid-July.  This year’s vintage will likely expire on July 14, just as  JPMorgan Chase  kicks-off the bulk of the bank and financial earnings reporting for the second quarter.  “Since 1985, the Nasdaq has averaged 2.5% over this 12-trading-day window, with a median advance of 2.9%,” he said in a recent blog post.

headline: JPMorgan Announces Cash Distributions for the JPMorgan ETFs
summary: TORONTO, July 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- J. P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM)* today announced the final June 2026 cash distributions for the below listed JPMorgan ETFs. The JPMorgan ETFs trade on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Unitholders of record on July 17, 2026 will receive cash distributions payable on July 23, 2026. Details of the “per unit” distributions are as follows: JPMorgan ETF nameTicker symbolDistribution per unit ($)Payment frequencyJPMorgan US Ultra-Short Income Active ETF
